name: learning-first-vscode
description: Teaches concepts before implementing — Socratic learning for developers. A teaching-first Copilot Chat participant that guides understanding through questions, not answers.

chatParticipants.name: learning-first
chatParticipants.description: Teaches concepts before implementing — Socratic learning for developers

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show your learning profile and progress

disambiguation.description: The user wants to learn about code or concepts before implementing them.
examples: Teach me how authentication works in this codebase
Help me understand the database schema before I make changes
I want to learn about the API patterns used here

learning-first.pluginRoot.description: Path to the learning-first plugin root directory. If empty, resolves from extension location.

learning-first.nodePath.description: Path to Node.js >= 22 binary. If empty, auto-detects from nvm or PATH.

learning-first.autoStartDashboard.description: Automatically start the learning dashboard server on first use.
